code:
%%{HealthTech_LabAnalyzer} }%% sequenceDiagram participant A as AppThread participant E as EventThread participant B as CommandEngine participant R as RoutingUtility Note over A: User calls API to send a command
A command packet is prepared with
all the command parameters A->>A: Enter Critical Section Note over A: Allocate unique packet id for the command
packet before it is being added to the queue A->>A: Exit Critical Section Note over A: Prepared command packet to be added
into respected command queue using
sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) Note left of A: Invoke the add to queue with atomic action API with
sli_queue_handle_t *handle
sl_slist_node_t *node
sli_queue_manager_action_handler_t action_handler rect rgba(HealthTech_PatientRecords) opt sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) A->>A: Enter Critical Section Note over A: This API facilitates user to perform an action
under the protection of queue's critical section alt if handler is not NULL A->>A: Invoke the handler with user specific data end A->>A: Add the command packet data to the queue A->>A: Exit Critical Section end end Note over A: Once the packet is queued in the respective command queue,
packet is dequeued in Command Engine and processed A->>B: Trigger TX event to Command Engine rect rgba(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) B->>B: Check the status of the queues
using SLI_QUEUE_GET_STATUS(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) opt SLI_QUEUE_GET_STATUS(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) B->>B: Return true if list is empty end Note over B: If the corresponding queue is not Empty,
then Command Engine will process the
comamnds in the commanmd queues end rect rgba(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) Note over R: When the underlying HAL layer receives
a packet, it will forward it to command
engine through routing utility R->>R: Add the packet to BUS RX queue opt sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_EMR_Sync) R->>R: Enter Critical Section R->>R: Add the command response
packet data to the queue R->>R: Exit critical section end R->>B: Set BUS RX event for Command Engine end rect rgba(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) Note over B: When a command response or a asynchronous data
packet is received, Command Engine will add the packet
to either response queue or the notification queue B->>B: Dequeue the RX Packet opt sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) B->>B: Enter Critical Section B->>B: Remove the BUS RX packet data from the queue head B->>B: Exit Critical Section B->>B: Return the data to Command Engine end opt sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) B->>B: Enter Critical Section B->>B: Add the command response packet data to
the response or Async notification queue B->>B: Exit critical section end end B->>A: If the response is a synchronous command response
Trigger corresponding RX Event rect rgba(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) A->>A: The thread waiting on the corresponding response wakes up Note over A: After waking up from desired event, thread checks if
and dequeues the response for expected packet id
using sli_queue_manager_remove_node_from_queue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) opt sli_queue_manager_remove_node_from_queue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) A->>A: Enter Critical Section alt if queue is empty A->>A: Exit Critical Section A->>A: Return SL_STATUS_EMPTY end loop Iterate through the nodes in the list A->>A: Invoke the compare function to identify the node Note over A: In this situation, packet_id identification
function is invoked end alt if comapre function returns true A->>A: Remove node from list A->>A: Exit Critical Section A->>A: Return the response packet else A->>A: Exit Critical Section A->>A: Return SL_STATUS_NOT_FOUND end end end rect rgba(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) alt if the received data packet is a Async data packet B->>B: Add received data packet to corresponding
notification event queue B->>E: Trigger Notification event to event handler thread Note over E: Event thread will be waiting for
notification events to be triggered Note over E: Once the Event is triggered, the
notification events are dequeued
from respective notification event queues
using sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer) opt sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine) E->>E: Enter Critical Section E->>E: Remove the Notification event packet data from the queue head E->>E: Exit Critical Section E->>E: Return the data to the application end Note over E: Invoke appropriate event handler with the event data end end
repo_description: Next-generation Silicon Labs Wi-Fi API for SiWx91x chipset family.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech LabAnalyzer系统画一个完整的时序图，核心是要展示命令包从AppThread发出，经过CommandEngine处理，再到异步事件通知的完整生命周期。
明白，这个系统涉及多个队列管理操作。我想确认一下参与者有哪些？目前我理解有AppThread、CommandEngine，还有处理异步事件的EventThread？
对的，还有RoutingUtility，它负责底层HAL层收到包后转发给CommandEngine。另外我们用HealthTech_EMR_Sync、HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine这些队列标识来区分不同业务线。
好的，那我先画出四个参与者：AppThread、EventThread、CommandEngine和RoutingUtility。AppThread这边用户调用API发送命令，需要准备命令包并分配唯一packet id，这个要在临界区里完成。
没错，分配packet id必须在Enter Critical Section和Exit Critical Section之间完成。然后AppThread要把准备好的命令包通过sli_queue_manager_enqueue加入HealthTech_EMR_Sync对应的队列。
我在AppThread上加了一个note，说明调用add to queue的atomic action API，参数包括sli_queue_handle_t、sl_slist_node_t和action_handler。然后用rect把HealthTech_PatientRecords相关的逻辑框起来。
等等，这里有个细节：sli_queue_manager_enqueue的实际参数应该是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，不是EMR_Sync。前面说的是队列归属，但入队操作本身是针对LabAnalyzer队列的。
收到，我修正一下。把opt块里的条件改成sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)，然后在里面展示：进入临界区、如果handler不为NULL就调用handler、添加数据到队列、退出临界区。
对的，handler不为NULL时才调用，这是条件分支。接下来AppThread要触发TX事件给CommandEngine，让CommandEngine开始处理队列里的命令。
我画了A到B的Trigger TX event箭头。然后在CommandEngine这边用HealthTech_EMR_Sync的rect框起来，里面先检查队列状态用SLI_QUEUE_GET_STATUS(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)。
检查状态这里需要再细化：还有一个opt分支，用SLI_QUEUE_GET_STATUS检查HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine，如果列表为空就返回true。这是为了判断是否有待处理命令。
加上了。然后note说明如果对应队列不为Empty，CommandEngine就会处理command queues里的命令。接下来RoutingUtility的部分，我用另一个HealthTech_EMR_Sync的rect框起来。
RoutingUtility这边是：当HAL层收到包后，转发给CommandEngine。先Add the packet to BUS RX queue，然后通过sli_queue_manager_enqueue(HealthTech_EMR_Sync)进入临界区操作。
这里我有点疑问：RoutingUtility的sli_queue_manager_enqueue参数是HealthTech_EMR_Sync，而之前AppThread的是HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，这是故意区分的吗？
是的，RoutingUtility处理的是EMR_Sync业务线的响应包入队，而AppThread那边是LabAnalyzer业务线的命令包入队。两个业务队列分开管理。
明白了。RoutingUtility在临界区里添加command response packet data到队列，然后Set BUS RX event for CommandEngine，触发CommandEngine处理。
现在到CommandEngine的核心处理逻辑。收到命令响应或异步数据包时，CommandEngine要把包加入response queue或notification queue。这里用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer的rect框起来。
我画了CommandEngine先Dequeue the RX Packet，然后用opt sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)进入临界区，从队列头移除BUS RX packet data。
移除后要把数据Return the data to CommandEngine。然后还有一个opt分支，用sli_queue_manager_enqueue把command response packet data加入response或Async notification queue。
加上了。然后CommandEngine到AppThread的箭头：If the response is a synchronous command response, Trigger corresponding RX Event。
对，同步响应走这条路。AppThread这边用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer的rect框起来，等待响应的线程会wake up。
我加了note说明线程醒来后，用sli_queue_manager_remove_node_from_queue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)检查并出队对应packet id的响应。
这个remove_node操作比较复杂，需要详细展开：先进入临界区，如果queue is empty就退出并返回SL_STATUS_EMPTY。
加上了alt分支处理empty情况。然后loop Iterate through the nodes in the list，调用compare function来识别目标节点。
对，compare function就是packet_id identification function。然后alt分支：如果compare返回true，就remove node、退出临界区、return the response packet；否则退出临界区返回SL_STATUS_NOT_FOUND。
完整加上了这个复杂的opt块。现在处理最后的异步数据包分支：alt if the received data packet is a Async data packet。
异步包的处理：CommandEngine把收到的数据包加入对应的notification event queue，然后Trigger Notification event给EventThread。这里继续用HealthTech_LabAnalyzer的rect。
我画了B到E的Trigger Notification event箭头。EventThread这边加note说明它会等待notification events被触发。
EventThread触发后，要从各自的notification event queues里用sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_LabAnalyzer)出队。但注意，实际出队操作的参数是HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine。
修正了，opt块里的条件是sli_queue_manager_dequeue(HealthTech_DiagnosticEngine)。里面是：进入临界区、从队列头移除Notification event packet data、退出临界区、返回数据给application。
最后加上note：Invoke appropriate event handler with the event data。这样整个异步通知流程就完整了。
我回顾一下整个流程：AppThread发命令入LabAnalyzer队列→CommandEngine处理→RoutingUtility收响应入EMR_Sync队列→CommandEngine分发→同步回AppThread或异步给EventThread。这样理解对吗？
完全正确。还有几个关键API再确认下：sli_queue_manager_enqueue、sli_queue_manager_dequeue、sli_queue_manager_remove_node_from_queue，以及状态检查SLI_QUEUE_GET_STATUS。
所有API和队列标识都已核对完毕。rect颜色块按业务线区分：HealthTech_PatientRecords、HealthTech_EMR_Sync、HealthTech_LabAnalyzer，逻辑清晰。
等等，RoutingUtility那个rect的颜色应该是HealthTech_EMR_Sync，但我看到前面CommandEngine检查队列状态也是EMR_Sync，这样两个rect颜色一样，会不会混淆？
不会混淆，因为它们本来就是同一业务线的不同阶段：CommandEngine检查EMR_Sync队列状态，RoutingUtility处理EMR_Sync的响应入队，逻辑上是连贯的。如果分开颜色反而割裂了流程。
说得对，保持EMR_Sync的统一颜色更能体现业务连贯性。整个时序图现在完整展示了命令包的生命周期：从AppThread准备、入队，到CommandEngine处理、RoutingUtility接收响应，最后同步返回或异步通知。可以定稿了。
